name: framebuilder

metadata.name: FrameBuilder
metadata.summary: Library for creating projects with a ready-made structure on popular Python frameworks

documentation:
рџ› FrameBuilderрџ› 

--- In this README рџ‘‡ --- ## Features This library is designed to unpack a ready-made project with a ready-made file structure. new templates will be added in the future ## Install and usage ```commandline pip install FrameBuilder ``` to unpack the template ```commandline builder-run ``` to change the template ```commandline builder-rebuild ```

modules.name: builder.templates.django_template.manage
documentation: Django's command-line utility for administrative tasks.

modules.name: builder.templates.django_template.config.asgi
documentation:
ASGI config for config project.

It exposes the ASGI callable as a module-level variable named `application`.

For more information on this file, see
<https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.0/howto/deployment/asgi/>

modules.name: builder.templates.django_template.config.wsgi
documentation:
WSGI config for config project.

It exposes the WSGI callable as a module-level variable named `application`.

For more information on this file, see
<https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.0/howto/deployment/wsgi/>
